ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarterly_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarterly report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the report belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the quarterly report */,
  "long_term_debt_capital" REAL /* Long-term debt capital */,
  "debt_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt-equity ratio */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin */,
  "ebit_margin" REAL /* EBIT margin */,
  "pre_tax_profit_margin" REAL /* Pre-tax profit margin */,
  "net_profit_margin" REAL /* Net profit margin */,
  "asset_turnover" REAL /* Asset turnover */,
  "roe" REAL /* Return on equity (ROE) */,
  "return_on_tangible_equity" REAL /* Return on tangible equity */,
  "roa" REAL /* Return on assets (ROA) */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) */,
  "book_value_per_share" REAL /* Book value per share */,
  "operating_cash_flow_per_share" REAL /* Operating cash flow per share */,
  "free_cash_flow_per_share" REAL /* Free cash flow per share */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the quarter */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the quarter */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow from operations */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "total_equity" REAL /* Total equity of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarterly_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "market_size" REAL /* Market size of the industry */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_size" REAL /* Market size of the sector */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last user login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quarterly report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES quarterly_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies_industries" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies_sectors" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarterly_report_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quarterly report */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarterly_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES quarterly_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the article is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
